headline: Spectrum suffers heavy loss as customers ditch service
summary: Spectrum, which offers mobile, internet, and cable TV services operated by Charter Communications, is struggling to shake a major customer problem. The company is rapidly losing a large number of customers, despite recent attempts to keep them from leaving. Amid this shift, the company is ...
